name: General Tsao's Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Teaspoons Rice Wine or Dry Sherry
1 Tablespoon Coarsely Chopped Fresh Orange Peel
or 2 Teaspoons Soaked and Coarsely Chopped Dried Citrus Peel
1/2 Teaspoon Finely Ground Roasted Sichuan Peppercorns
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into thin slices, about 2 inches long, cutting against the grain.
2. Place chicken in a bowl with soy sauce, rice wine, ginger, cornstarch, and 1 teaspoon sesame oil.
3. Mix well and let marinate for approximately 20 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
5. Remove chicken from marinade using a slotted spoon and add to the pan.
6. Stir-fry for 2 minutes until browned.
7. Drain chicken in a colander or sieve, then remove from heat.
8. Pour off most of the oil, leaving about 2 teaspoons.
9. Reheat the pan over high heat and add dried chilies. Stir-fry for 10 seconds.
10. Return chicken to the pan and add remaining ingredients.
11. Stir-fry for 4 minutes, mixing well.
12. Serve immediately over white rice.
